title: Linux Kernel Version Requirements — What's next
text:
See
sysctls
for more details.
Allow running kube-proxy with in
nftables mode
.

cgroups v2

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.
Open an issue in the
GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
.

content guide
